title: neolloydia erectocentra
intro: Neolloydia erectocentra, also known as the night-blooming cereus or Queen of the Night, is a rare and unique succulent plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, Neolloydia erectocentra has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat various health issues due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit some antiviral properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Neolloydia erectocentra is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve in herbal medicine, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it, as its safety and efficacy have not been extensively studied.
